ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the restaurant */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the restaurant (e.g., $, $$, $$$, $$$) */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_style_count" INTEGER /* Number of cuisine styles offered by the restaurant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_price_range FOREIGN KEY ("price_range") REFERENCES price_ranges ("price_range_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisine_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine style */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant offering the cuisine style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine style (e.g., Italian, Mediterranean, European) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cuisine style record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cuisine style record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cuisine_styles_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "review_version" TEXT /* Version of the review (to support versioning) */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the latest version of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the reviewer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the reviewer's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reviewer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reviewer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_ranges" (
  "price_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price range */,
  "price_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the price range (e.g., $, $$, $$$, $$$) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price range record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price range record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant the URL belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the URL record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the URL record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_urls_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "url_ids" (
  "url_id_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL ID */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant the URL ID belongs to */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the URL ID record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the URL ID record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_url_ids_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
